description: Per-route business dashboard. Platform KPIs, per-route drill-down with ASR, NER, CCR, ACD, ABD, PDD, MOS, hard failure and capacity block ratios. Detail and quality timeseries include anomaly detection bands color-matched to lines.

panels.title: CC Connected
panels.description: Platform-wide connected (answered) calls. Always live.

panels.title: CPS Answered
panels.description: Answered calls per second (2m rate). Always live.

panels.title: Total Minutes
panels.description: Total billed minutes in last 24h. Always live.

panels.title: ABD
panels.description: Average Billed Duration (talk time) in seconds. Always live.

panels.title: ACD
panels.description: Average Call Duration in seconds.

panels.title: PDD
panels.description: Post Dial Delay in seconds.

panels.title: MOS
panels.description: Mean Opinion Score from RTPEngine (1.0-5.0).

panels.title: NER %
panels.description: Network Effectiveness Ratio -- % of calls reaching subscriber.

panels.title: ASR %
panels.description: Answer Seizure Ratio -- % of calls answered.

panels.title: CCR %
panels.description: Call Completion Ratio -- % with SIP code <= 499.

panels.title: GW Hard Fail %
panels.description: % of gateway attempts with fatal (non-retriable) failures.

panels.title: GW Block %
panels.description: % of gateway attempts blocked by CC/CPS limits.

panels.title: Connected per Route
panels.description: Connected (answered) calls per route over time.

panels.title: CPS per Route
panels.description: Outbound attempts/s per route (gwatt_real), 2m window -- every call routed through this route regardless of outcome.

panels.title: LIVE Route Summary - last 5 mins
panels.description: One row per route. Sort by any column to find outliers. CC Connected=answered legs (cc_connected, same as 'Connected per Route' panel), CC Outbound=all active outbound legs (cc_outbound, setup+ringing+connected), CPS Tot=outbound attempts/s regardless of outcome (same metric as 'CPS per Route' panel), CPS Ans=answered calls/s, Hard Fail=non-answer responses, Block=CC/CPS limit hit.

panels.title: CC
panels.description: Outbound CC for selected route.

panels.title: CPS Tot
panels.description: Total call attempts/s for selected route.

panels.title: CPS Ans
panels.description: Answered calls/s for selected route.

panels.title: ABD
panels.description: Average Billed Duration for selected route.

panels.title: ACD
panels.description: Average Call Duration for selected route.

panels.title: PDD
panels.description: Post Dial Delay for selected route (seconds).

panels.title: MOS
panels.description: MOS for selected route, 2m window.

panels.title: NER %
panels.description: Network Effectiveness Ratio for selected route.

panels.title: ASR %
panels.description: Answer Seizure Ratio for selected route.

panels.title: CCR %
panels.description: Call Completion Ratio for selected route.

panels.title: Hard Fail %
panels.description: Fatal failure ratio for selected route, 2m window.

panels.title: Block %
panels.description: Capacity block ratio for selected route, 2m window.

panels.title: ${ru} -- Concurrent Calls
panels.description: Outbound (emerald, ru_cc_outbound band) and connected (amber, ru_cc_connected band) CC.

panels.title: ${ru} -- CPS
panels.description: CPS attempts (violet, ru_cps band) and CPS answered (cyan, ru_cps_answered band).

panels.title: ${ru} -- ASR & NER
panels.description: ASR (coral) and NER (blue) with matching anomaly bands.

panels.title: ${ru} -- PDD
panels.description: Post Dial Delay (seconds) with anomaly band.

panels.title: ${ru} -- ACD & ABD
panels.description: ACD (sapphire) and ABD (emerald) with anomaly bands.

panels.title: ${ru} -- MOS
panels.description: Mean Opinion Score per route with anomaly band.

panels.title: ${ru} -- Hard Fail & Block %
panels.description: Hard Fail % (red): final non-answer response. Block % (orange): CC/CPS limit hit.

panels.title: ${ru} -- Errors per Second by Category
panels.description: Per-route platform error rates aggregated into 9 operational categories.

matcher.options: SIP state [481_*, loose_route, reinvite, invite_ended, bye_wrong, canc_trx, prack_kill, create_dlg]
Body / SDP [mixed_*, strms_*, fix_nat_cont, subst, bad_rm/rs]

targets.legendFormat: SIP state [481_*, loose_route, reinvite, invite_ended, bye_wrong, canc_trx, prack_kill, create_dlg]
Body / SDP [mixed_*, strms_*, fix_nat_cont, subst, bad_rm/rs]

panels.title: ${ru} -- trace ( > 0, < 0.01 /s )
panels.description: Per-code rates currently in the trace band: extremely rare codes (>0, <0.01 /s). Occasional blips or counter artifacts. A sustained line here may indicate a newly-woken code.

panels.title: ${ru} -- rare ( 0.01 - 0.05 /s )
panels.description: Per-code rates currently in the rare band: rare codes (0.01-0.05 /s, ~1-3/min). Low-frequency anomalies that vanish in category sums. A code promoted here from trace is starting to recur.

panels.title: ${ru} -- low ( 0.05 - 0.2 /s )
panels.description: Per-code rates currently in the low band: low-frequency codes (0.05-0.2 /s, ~3-12/min). Persistent background noise. Newcomers from the rare band are mild but worth investigating.

panels.title: ${ru} -- moderate ( 0.2 - 1 /s )
panels.description: Per-code rates currently in the moderate band: moderate codes (0.2-1 /s, ~12-60/min). Steady error sources. Anything entering this band from below signals a real issue.

panels.title: ${ru} -- high ( 1 - 5 /s )
panels.description: Per-code rates currently in the high band: high-rate codes (1-5 /s, ~60-300/min). Loud failures that need investigation. A code promoted here from moderate is an active incident.

panels.title: ${ru} -- storm ( >= 5 /s )
panels.description: Per-code rates currently in the storm band: storm-rate codes (>=5 /s, 300+/min). Severe failures requiring immediate attention. Every code plotted here is an active outage component.

panels.title: ${ru} -- Error Code Detail
panels.description: Every individual _90_ERROR_<code> counter for ${ru} with its current 5m rate, max over the last hour, and baseline 6h ago.

credent_01.text: Auth: caller's From-user does not match credential ($au != $fU)

credent_02.text: Auth: same as credent_01 (verbose log line, fires together)

401_INVITE_01.text: Carrier auth: 401 to outbound INVITE (digest challenge -- expected IP auth)

provis_bug_01.text: Routing: provisioning bug -- legacy code path that should not fire

cps_plat_01.text: Capacity: pre-auth platform CPS gate (ratelimit, 2010 cps)

cps_callr_01.text: Capacity: pre-auth per-caller CPS gate ($fU, 500 cps)

cps_plat_02.text: Capacity: post-auth platform CPS gate (1100 cps hard limit)

cps_callr_02.text: Capacity: post-auth per-caller CPS gate (per-customer config)

cc_plat_02.text: Capacity: platform concurrent calls limit (16000 hard limit)

cc_callr_02.text: Capacity: per-caller concurrent calls limit (per-customer config)

timeout_01.text: Timeout: TM fr_inv_timeout (60s) -- downstream did not reply

timeout_02.text: Timeout: same as timeout_01 (deferred path, mute)

481_INVITE_01.text: SIP state: 481 to INVITE -- TM transaction not found

481_BYE_01.text: SIP state: 481 to BYE -- TM transaction not found

481_OPTIONS_01.text: SIP state: 481 to OPTIONS -- TM transaction not found

481_CANCEL_01.text: SIP state: 481 to CANCEL -- TM transaction not found

481_ACK_01.text: SIP state: 481 to ACK -- TM transaction not found

loose_route_01.text: SIP state: loose_route() failed on sequential request -> 404

reinvite_01.text: SIP state: re-INVITE counted (informational, not a real error)

invite_ended_01.text: SIP state: INVITE arrived for an already-ended dialog

bye_wrong_01.text: SIP state: BYE arrived for unknown dialog / Call-ID

canc_trx_01.text: SIP state: CANCEL arrived with no matching transaction

prack_kill_01.text: SIP state: PRACK race -- non-200 to PRACK, dialog killed

create_dlg_01.text: SIP state: create_dialog() failed (server internal error 500)

term_reas_01.text: Teardown: initial BYE/CANCEL with anomalous DLG_end_reason

term_rs_02.text: Teardown: anomalous reply during teardown (onreply re-INVITE)

rm_tobek_01.text: Teardown: sequential request after TO_BE_KILLED set

rs_tobek_01.text: Teardown: reply arrived after TO_BE_KILLED set

rs_tocanc_02.text: Teardown: 200 OK for cancelled dialog (late branch race)

rs_toend_02.text: Teardown: 200 OK for ended dialog (late branch race)

mixed_01.text: Body/SDP: multipart/mixed body in sequential req

mixed_02.text: Body/SDP: multipart/mixed in seq req, no SDP after strip

mixed_04.text: Body/SDP: multipart/mixed in failure_route, no SDP after strip

mixed_brn_02.text: Body/SDP: multipart/mixed in branch_route, no SDP after strip

mixed_rs_02.text: Body/SDP: multipart/mixed in onreply, no SDP after strip

strms_seq_01.text: Body/SDP: multi-stream SDP in sequential req

bad_rm_03.text: Body/SDP: malformed request alt path (dead code)

result.text: SIP state: 481 to $1 (TM transaction not found)

title: 53. Routes
